source.name: Medi-Cal Managed Care — Enrollment & Capitation Rates

cadence: enrollment monthly; capitation rate certifications per rating period
caveats: Enrollment counts are per plan per county per month as reported by DHCS; a plan's statewide figure sums its county rows.
Capitation rates are DHCS-certified RANGES (lower/midpoint/upper, per member per month) by rating period, county, and category of aid — they are prices, not amounts spent.
What each plan pays hospitals, clinics, and physicians remains non-public — this dataset extends visibility exactly one hop and no further.
Dental managed care (e.g. Liberty Dental) rates are certified separately and are not in these files; such plans show enrollment without a rate range.

Enrollment and rate datasets never agree on plan names; we join them with a published normalization + curated alias list and report the measured match rate (enrollee-weighted) instead of pretending it's complete.
